questionHtml:
At what stage of meiosis do chromosome pairing and crossing over occur?

A.  Interphase

B.  Prophase 1

C.  Metaphase 1

D.  Prophase 2

meta.title: At what stage of meiosis do chromosome pairing and crossing over occur? A. Interphase B. Prophase 1 C. Metaphase 1 D. Prophase 2
